message:
feat(ft-xbnl0.2.3): cx-first StorageHandle::new mass migration (tick 301)

Mass migration of the remaining 29 ambient `StorageHandle::new(&db_path)`
call sites in main.rs to `new_with_cx` using a uniform inline cx-resolver
form via `replace_all`.

**Pattern used:**

```rust
// before:
frankenterm_core::storage::StorageHandle::new(&db_path).await

// after:
frankenterm_core::storage::StorageHandle::new_with_cx(
    &frankenterm_core::cx::Cx::current()
        .unwrap_or_else(frankenterm_core::cx::for_request),
    &db_path,
)
.await
```

Single inline `Cx::current()` resolve per call site. The alternative
(28 individual edits with named bindings) was rejected in favor of this
compact idiom — each scratch-handle open is a one-shot operation where
a per-site named binding buys nothing since the cx is only used for the
single `new_with_cx` call (the follow-on reads were already migrated in
prior ticks with their own named cx bindings).

Plus one finer-grained migration in `ft robot accounts refresh`
rate-limit path (L22030 area): `get_accounts_by_service` →
`get_accounts_by_service_with_cx(&ratelimit_cx, ...)` with a shared
ratelimit_cx binding.

Verification: `cargo check -p frankenterm --bin ft` compiles clean
(5 warnings baseline).

Cumulative ft-xbnl0.2.3 ticks this session: 115 (187-301).
main.rs cross-crate migration total: 230 sites (200 before + 29 +
  ratelimit get_accounts_by_service site).
frankenterm-core internal sites: 58 (unchanged this tick).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
